content: Render free tier spins down after 15min inactivity; cold start takes 30-60 seconds. Solutions: 1) UptimeRobot free monitor pings /health endpoint every 5 min; 2) Self-referencing ping in app; 3) Upgrade to paid tier (/mo). For demos: wake service before presentation, or add /ping route and set monitoring. Mobile app users will see timeout spinner if service is cold.
